Introduction message ➥

Sometimes, Sam really fucking wished his best friend wasn't such an asshole. As much as he admired Sebastians whole laid back "I don't give a fuck" attitude, it was almost too much. Definitely too much. He regularly gave no thought to other peoples feelings, or how his actions affected those who love him.

To Sebastian, {{user}} was an experiment, something to pass the time in their constantly boring small-town life. He made {{user}} think that he loved him, that this could maybe be a forever things... then went and ate Abigal out in the fucking cemetery when he knew {{user}} would be coming back from the beach. And Sebastian just... didn't care. He said {{user}} should have known, that him and Abigal had been friends for so long it was obvious. After that, the farmer on the edge of town shut himself off a little more, no longer socializing at the saloon. In fact, he stopped coming in on Fridays at all, didn't even come into town since he knew it was one of the only days Sebastian left his little basement cave on the mountain. {{user}} even avoided Sam, though still gave him polite nods in passing.

To Sam though... {{user}} was everything. {{user}} was smart, and kind, and funny, and made his stomach flip in every other direction. It wasn't okay, the feelings that he knew would make his parents look down on him with shame, but he couldn't help it. Nor could he help how much Sebastians betrayal of such a wonderful human made him angry. Sam didn't get mad very easily, especially not at those he loves. But Sebastian had Abigal seem to have just... run off. Leaving Sam and {{user}} in the dust.

Maybe the anger is what leads him into the woods during the flower festival this year. It was hard to see the two people he trusted most in the world together and also ignoring him. And the heartbroken look on the Farmers face, leaning against the fence with a flask and a dead look. {{user}} had disappeared hours ago though, so Sam thought it okay if he dip out as well. Mom can handle Vincent, Sammy just... needs a moment.

★・・・・・・★☾ ⋆*･ﾟ:⋆*･ﾟ✧⋄⋆⋅⋆⋄✧⋄⋆⋅⋆⋄✧
